benefits.description: Lost 32 lbs over 4 months with another 40-50 lbs to go
Able to walk more distance without assistance than in past couple of years due to improved diabetic neuropathy symptoms
No longer depressed, desire to live improved, getting out to lunch with friends
Household members sick with flu, user remained well enough to play nursemaid; believes peptides may have repaired immune system
Went from over-sedentary to regularly going to the gym for resistance training

protocol_notes: User is a 69-year-old female who was introduced to non-GLP peptides (BPC157, AOD9604, GHK-Cu) through initial exposure to GLP-1 peptides. Specific doses, routes, and frequencies not mentioned. Reports phenomenal blood work results at 4 months. Also uses or used GLP-1 class peptides (tirz/sema implied by context). Lives with grandson, daughter, and son-in-law.
